overview: A minimal single-service architecture exposing a Hello World REST API. The service is implemented in Go using net/http, containerized with Docker, and deployed on Kubernetes as a backend service.
requirements: Expose GET /hello returning JSON greeting with HTTP 200
Include Content-Type: application/json header on all responses
Log timestamp, method, path, and status code for each request
Return 500 and log details on unhandled exceptions

components.name: hello-api
components.openAPISpec:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Hello World API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Simple Hello World REST API
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:9090
paths:
  /hello:
    get:
      summary: Returns a Hello World greeting
      operationId: getHello
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful greeting response
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Greeting'
        '405':
          description: Method Not Allowed
        '500':
          description: Internal Server Error
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      operationId: getHealth
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Service healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Health'
components:
  schemas:
    Greeting:
      type: object
      properties:
        message:
          type: string
          example: Hello World
      required: [message]
    Health:
      type: object
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          example: ok
      required: [status]
components.componentAgentInstructions:
Implement a Go backend service using the standard library net/http package, listening on port 9090.

Endpoints:
- GET /hello → respond 200 with JSON body {"message":"Hello World"}. For any other method on /hello, return 405 Method Not Allowed.
- GET /health → respond 200 with JSON body {"status":"ok"}.
- Any other path → return 404 Not Found with JSON body {"error":"not found"}.

All responses MUST set header Content-Type: application/json.

Middleware:
- Logging middleware that logs timestamp (RFC3339), HTTP method, path, and response status code for every request. Use a responseWriter wrapper to capture status.
- Recovery middleware that recovers from panics, logs the error and stack trace, and returns HTTP 500 with JSON body {"error":"internal server error"}.

Use http.ServeMux. Implement graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM with 10s timeout. Provide a Dockerfile using multi-stage build (golang:1.22-alpine → distroless/static or alpine), exposing port 9090. Include go.mod with module name hello-api.
